hazards: clean tool result (account record, order status)
stale mutable source (order world_epoch A, superseded preference)
unverified effect claim (note: no confirmation checked)

arms.name: full-transcript
arms.note: baseline: carries the whole flat transcript; sealed and tombstoned pages leak because nothing is filtered.

arms.name: naive-global-summary
arms.note: baseline: one lossy blob; cheapest in bytes but loses provenance, leaks sealed content, and cannot fall back to raw.

arms.name: provenance-bound-virtual-views
arms.note: fak: demand-paged provenance-bound views; sealed pages refused, stale views recomputed across the policy boundary — fail-closed.

stale_replay.description: a goal view built under policy epoch A is served again under epoch B; the stale view is rejected and RECOMPUTEd, never served as a HIT.

poison_replay.description: a query targeting a sealed source's descriptor is REFUSED; no sealed or tombstoned page enters any derived view.
